title: OpenSearch
description: An OpenSearch node that supports classic BM25 search and vector search
for ingestion and retrieval workflows. Works with self-managed OpenSearch.

documents.page_content: The capital of France is Paris.

questions.text: What is the capital of France?

opensearch.collection.title: Collection
opensearch.collection.description: The name of the collection to use for the OpenSearch index. Only lowercase letters, numbers, and underscores are allowed.

opensearch.mode.title: Store Mode
opensearch.mode.description: Toggle between index and vector store.

opensearch.search.title: Customize Indexing Search Behavior
opensearch.search.description: Customize the search behavior of the index. This option does not affect the ingestion and creation of the index. You can switch between behaviors when searching between pipeline runs.

opensearch.matchOperator.title: Match Operator
description: Controls how multiple query terms are matched:
'or' (default) matches documents containing ANY of the query terms,
'and' matches documents containing ALL of the query terms,
'exact' requires the exact phrase to appear in order (phrase matching).

opensearch.search.exact.slop.title: Slop
opensearch.search.exact.slop.description: The number of words to allow between terms when exact phrase search is enabled.

opensearch.search.highlight.title: Return contextual snippets
opensearch.search.highlight.description: Use the unified highlighter to return snippets around matches.

opensearch.search.highlight.fragment_siz.title: Snippet size (characters)
opensearch.search.highlight.fragment_siz.description: Maximum characters in the returned highlight snippet (context window) per hit.

opensearch.score.title: Retrieval Score
opensearch.score.description: Minimum retrieval score for vector stores

opensearch.dim.title: Embedding Dimension
opensearch.dim.description: Required in vector store mode; dimension of embedding vectors.
